compatibility.support_notes: Product-verified default backend; this remains the only promoted shipping runtime.

model_inspection.support_notes: Product-verified default backend; this remains the only promoted shipping runtime.

caveats: Lower peak throughput than the fan-backed Burst lane.
Selected for repeatable long replies while the v0.2 decay work continues.
profile.name: stable
profile.summary: Stable Mode: exact/staged long-reply path with no fan control. Hidden from first-run onboarding, but available by flag for compatibility.
